free_text: Alpha-particle excitation of quadrupole and octupole
surface modes in Ti,Fe,Ni,Zn and Sr
152 cm cyclotron with two-magnet external beam
system for precise definition of alpha particle energy
ScI(Tl) crystal-photomultiplier scintillation
spectrometer in 61 cm scattering chamber
Beam passing through the target monitored by measuring
charge collected on the Faraday cup with balistic
galvanometer
The measurement of an absolute cross section was made
by normalizing counts in the appropriate peak to the
deflection of a calibrated ballistic galvanometer
which measured the charge collected on the Faraday
cup system.
No information given
